name: Otter.ai Meeting Transcription API
what_it_does: Otter.ai API for AI-powered meeting transcription and voice note platform. Enables access to meeting transcripts, AI-generated summaries, and conversation data from Zoom, Google Meet, and Microsoft Teams meetings. Otter is known for real-time transcription and collaborative note-taking during live meetings.
use_cases: Retrieving live and post-meeting transcripts from productivity agents
Accessing AI meeting summaries and key takeaways from knowledge management agents
Integrating Otter transcripts into note-taking and project management workflow agents
Searching conversation history across past meetings from research agents
not_for: Legal or compliance call recording without participant consent
best_when: A team using Otter.ai for meeting notes wants AI agents to access transcripts, extract action items, and sync meeting intelligence into productivity tools.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Meeting transcripts contain confidential conversations. CONSENT: All meeting participants must be informed of recording in most jurisdictions. Otter API access is limited — verify current API availability.

auth.notes: Otter.ai API access is limited and primarily available via enterprise agreements. Contact Otter for API partner access. Authentication details not publicly documented.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: 300 minutes transcription/month; no API access
pricing.paid_tiers: Pro, Business, and Enterprise plans; API only on Enterprise
pricing.notes: API access is enterprise-only. Consumer plans do not include API. Contact Otter sales for API access.

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Meeting transcripts contain sensitive business conversations
CONSENT: Recording requires participant notification in most jurisdictions
No public MCP server — enterprise API access required
API access is enterprise-only — not available on consumer or business plans
Public API documentation is minimal — enterprise customers get private docs
Consider Fireflies.ai for more developer-accessible meeting transcription API
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Meeting conversation data. SOC2, GDPR. Enterprise-only API — very limited public access. Recording consent requirements.

security_score_components.security_notes: Meeting conversation PII. SOC2, GDPR. Enterprise-only API access.
